search_candidates.title: Investor relations - Ashmore Group
search_candidates.content: ## Main navigation. ###### The “no war, no peace, no oil” status lives on. ## Tentang Ashmore Indonesia. PT Ashmore Asset Management Indonesia Tbk currently operates as an investment manager focusing on three main investment products: stocks, bonds - both local (Rupiah) denominated and denominated in other foreign currencies- and money market. The Company has so far established a strong track record of superior fund performance since its inception. PT Ashmore  Asset Management Indonesia Tbk is an Indonesia Stock Exchange listed company. Registered office and company details:. Current financial overview in the form of a summary of financial position (balance sheet), income statement and ratio. ## What type of investor are you? ## Terms & Conditions. Please read our terms & conditions and click to proceed. ولا تشكّل أو تكوّن المعلومات الواردة في هذا الموقع الإلكتروني جزءاً من أي عرض لبيع أو شراء أو الاكتتاب أو الاستثمار في وحدات أو أسهم في أي من صناديق شركة أشمور.
